title: LightShield
body:
Add shield system to Minecraft！

Player will have 4 shield. shield can slowly recover.

Mod provides equipment enchantments to enhance your shield.

such as maxshield and shieldregen...they can all strengthen your shield.


![HealthBar](https://i.mcmod.cn/editor/upload/20240304/1709530323_286741_wCJb.webp)

You can install [AsteorBar](https://modrinth.com/mod/asteorbar) Mod for better shield display

![AsteorBar ShieldHUD](https://i.mcmod.cn/editor/upload/20240314/1710405640_286741_myIc.webp)
